## PROJECT 1: FlipMyEra — The Cash Cow 💰
**Status:** Most mature (492 files, 86K lines, 77 deps, 49 test files)
**Stack:** React + Vite + Clerk + Stripe + Supabase + Sentry + OpenTelemetry
**Revenue Model:** Direct consumer sales (Taylor Swift ebook creator)

### What LanceDB Found
- Massive codebase with strong infrastructure (OpenTelemetry, Sentry, rate limiting)
- 180 components, 49 test files — the most production-ready project
- Already has: webhooks, middleware, JWT auth, rate limiting, job queues, scheduled tasks, caching
- Cross-references Trendpilot (8 files) — integration exists conceptually

### The Plan
| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **Payment hardening** — Stripe webhook idempotency, retry logic, refund flows | Protects revenue | Night 1 |
| 2 | **Onboarding funnel** — Welcome → Template → Preview → Purchase in <60s | ↑ Conversion 2-3x | Night 1 |
| 3 | **SEO content engine** — 10 long-tail keyword pages ("swiftie gifts", "eras tour ebook") | Organic traffic | Night 1 |
| 4 | **Admin dashboard** — Revenue, signups, generation stats, error tracking | Nathan's command center | Night 1 |
| 5 | **Email sequences** — Welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, referral nudge | ↑ LTV 40%+ | Night 2 |
| 6 | **A/B testing** — Pricing page variants, CTA copy, template previews | Data-driven growth | Night 2 |
| 7 | **Expand templates** — K-pop, Marvel, custom fandoms → 10x TAM | ↑ Market size | Night 3 |

### Integration Points
- **NarrativeReactor** generates marketing content for FlipMyEra automatically
- **Trendpilot** feeds trending fan topics → new template ideas
- **n8n** handles abandoned cart emails, Stripe webhook processing

---

## PROJECT 2: Second-Opinion — The Trophy 🏆
**Status:** Competition-ready (203 files, 35K lines, 14 deps, 34 test files)
**Stack:** React + Vite + Firebase + Tailwind + Framer Motion + i18n
**Revenue Model:** Kaggle MedGemma competition → credibility → potential SaaS pivot
**Deadline:** Feb 24, 2026 (6 days)

### What LanceDB Found
- 47 components, 34 test files, strong docs (23 files)
- Multi-language support (i18next), accessibility patterns
- JWT auth, rate limiting, job queues — enterprise-grade architecture for a competition
- Cross-references Trendpilot (6 files)
- Unique patterns: no webhooks (Firebase handles real-time), no express (client-side SPA)

### The Plan
| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **Wire AgenticPipeline** — Connect to AnalysisDashboard | Core UX complete | TONIGHT |
| 2 | **Interactive demo mode** — Auto-play 3 medical cases with narration | Judges see value instantly | TONIGHT |
| 3 | **E2E Playwright tests** — 20+ user journey scenarios | Shows engineering rigor | TONIGHT |
| 4 | **Architecture docs** — Mermaid diagrams, data flow, security model | Judges love depth | TONIGHT |
| 5 | **Performance** — Lighthouse 90+, code splitting, offline support | Polish matters | Night 2 |
| 6 | **Video recording** — Nathan records demo with prepared script | Submission requirement | Day (Nathan) |

### Post-Competition Pivot
- If it wins/places: build into a real product (telehealth integration, HIPAA compliance)
- The multi-model consensus engine is genuinely novel — no competitor does this
- Could become a ForwardLane product offering

---

## PROJECT 3: NarrativeReactor — The Growth Engine 🚀
**Status:** Strong foundation (242 files, 22K lines, 22 deps, 24 test files)
**Stack:** Express + Genkit + Anthropic + Firebase + Google AI + fal.ai
**Revenue Model:** Internal tool → possible SaaS for content teams

### What LanceDB Found
- The most architecturally sophisticated backend: webhooks, middleware, JWT, job queues, scheduling, caching
- Already has intelligence endpoints: competitor tracking, hashtag discovery, optimal scheduling
- 88 docs files — extremely well documented
- Cross-references Trendpilot (5 files) — the bridge is partially built
- Uses both Anthropic and Google AI (Genkit) — multi-model content generation

### The Plan
| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **API integration testing** — Wire all 8 routes with real auth flow | Deployable backend | Night 1 |
| 2 | **Content pipeline** — Topic → Research → Draft → Format (X/LinkedIn/Blog) | Core value prop | Night 1 |
| 3 | **Blotato publishing** — Cross-platform posting via Blotato API | Automated distribution | Night 1 |
| 4 | **Campaign dashboard** — React UI for content calendar, A/B tests, analytics | User-facing product | Night 2 |
| 5 | **Trendpilot bridge** — Real-time trend data feeds content ideation | Ecosystem synergy | Night 2 |
| 6 | **Multi-brand** — ForwardLane + SignalHaus content from one engine | Operational leverage | Night 3 |

### Integration Points (THIS IS THE HUB)
- **Trendpilot** → feeds trending topics to NarrativeReactor for content ideation
- **FlipMyEra** → NR generates marketing content, social posts, SEO articles
- **ForwardLane/SignalHaus** → NR produces brand content for both websites
- **n8n** → NR triggers workflows for content approval, scheduling, distribution
- **Blotato** → NR publishes directly to X, LinkedIn, Instagram

---

## PROJECT 4: Trendpilot — The Intelligence Layer 📊
**Status:** Solid TDD foundation (93 files, 9K lines, 3 deps, 44 test files)
**Stack:** Express + node-cron + Zod (intentionally minimal)
**Revenue Model:** SaaS — trend monitoring API with 4-tier pricing

### What LanceDB Found
- Highest test ratio of any project (44 test files / 93 total = 47%)
- Lean dependency tree (express, node-cron, zod) — fast, deployable, scalable
- Full pattern suite: webhooks, middleware, rate limiting, job queues, scheduling, caching
- API endpoints: health, trends, sources, subscriptions, profiles, alerts, personalization
- No cross-references TO other projects, but 3 projects reference IT

### The Plan
| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **Full stack integration** — Merge phases 1-5 into working app | Deployable product | Night 1 |
| 2 | **React dashboard** — Real-time charts, filters, alert management | User-facing product | Night 1 |
| 3 | **Railway deploy** — Postgres, Redis, health checks, migrations | Production-ready | Night 2 |
| 4 | **Landing page + pricing** — 4 tiers, feature comparison, API docs | Sales-ready | Night 2 |
| 5 | **NarrativeReactor feed** — Push trending topics to NR for content | Ecosystem value | Night 2 |
| 6 | **White-label** — Multi-tenant, theming, team management | Enterprise revenue | Night 3 |

### The Data Flywheel
Trendpilot is the **data spine** of the ecosystem:
- Monitors trends → feeds NarrativeReactor → generates content → drives FlipMyEra templates
- As a standalone SaaS, it has the cleanest path to recurring revenue after FlipMyEra

---

## PROJECT 5: doc-pipeline — The Knowledge Engine 🧠
**Status:** Utility project (16 files, 2.7K lines, 8 deps)
**Stack:** LanceDB + OpenAI + pdf-parse + mammoth + Postgres

### What LanceDB Found
- Already uses LanceDB for vector embeddings — the RAG foundation
- Parses PDF and DOCX documents
- Connected to Postgres for metadata storage

### The Plan
| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |
|-------|------|-------|----------|
| 1 | **Integrate with NarrativeReactor** — RAG-powered content research | Smarter content | Night 2 |
| 2 | **Feed Second-Opinion** — Medical literature search | Competition edge | Night 1 |
| 3 | **Index all project docs** — Searchable knowledge base | Dev productivity | Night 3 |

---

## PROJECT 6 & 7: ForwardLane.com + SignalHaus.ai — The Storefronts 🌐

| Phase | Task | Value | Timeline |

| 1 | **GitHub repos + Vercel deploy** | Live professional presence | Night 1 |
| 2 | **SEO optimization** — Structured data, OG images, sitemaps | Discoverability | Night 1 |

## THE INTEGRATION ARCHITECTURE

### Shared Services Layer
```
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                  Shared Auth (Clerk)                   │
│  FlipMyEra ← already using │ NR, TP ← need to adopt  │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                  Shared DB (Postgres)                  │
│  Railway Postgres ← single instance, per-schema       │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                  Shared Cache (Redis)                  │
│  Railway Redis ← rate limiting, sessions, queues      │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│               Shared Vectors (LanceDB)                 │
│  doc-pipeline ← embed everything, search everything   │
├──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│              Shared Automation (n8n)                   │
│  Webhooks, email sequences, content scheduling        │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

### Data Flow Between Projects
```
Trendpilot (detects trends)
    │
    ▼
NarrativeReactor (generates content about trends)
    │
    ├──► FlipMyEra (new template ideas based on trends)
    ├──► ForwardLane.com (auto-published insights)
    ├──► SignalHaus.ai (auto-published insights)
    └──► Blotato → X, LinkedIn, Instagram
    
doc-pipeline (indexes all content)
    │
    ├──► NarrativeReactor (RAG-powered research)
    ├──► Second-Opinion (medical literature search)
    └──► Honey (workspace knowledge)

n8n (orchestrates everything)
    │
    ├──► FlipMyEra webhooks (Stripe, abandoned cart)
    ├──► NarrativeReactor scheduling (content calendar)
    ├──► Trendpilot alerts (trend notifications)
    └──► Email sequences (all projects)
```

---

---

## KEY INSIGHT FROM LANCEDB ANALYSIS

The **integration graph** shows NarrativeReactor is the natural hub — it references more projects than any other and is referenced by the websites. But **Trendpilot is the data spine** — 3 projects already reference it.

The winning move: **Trendpilot feeds NarrativeReactor feeds everything else.** This creates a data flywheel where:
1. Trendpilot detects what's trending
2. NarrativeReactor generates content about it
3. Content drives traffic to FlipMyEra (consumer revenue) and the websites (B2B credibility)
4. More traffic = more data = better trend detection

This isn't 6 separate projects — it's one machine with 6 gears. 🍯
